test_cases.prompt: Export the current page as a standalone HTML file
assertions: Verifies the page is set as root in App.tsx
Runs vite build with singlefile plugin
Produces self-contained HTML with inlined CSS and JS

test_cases.prompt: Save this landing page as an HTML file I can share
assertions: Ensures landing page is the render target
Output is a single HTML file with no external dependencies

test_cases.prompt: Generate a static HTML version of my page for deployment
assertions: Sets correct page as App.tsx root
Includes all design token CSS custom properties
